reviews.review_msg: I feel like shes a hit or miss. People either really like her or hate her. I personally couldnt learn anything from her, I could grasp the concepts she was trying to explain. I failed in her class. Retook it with a different prof and got a 85% so Im blaming the teacher lol.

I had her for ECON 8500 at BCIT - it was a condensed class, 2 days a week for 8 wks. The subject is hard, but Iryna is a great instructor, her lectures are great and so easy to study off of. Very fair grader, she'll give you partial marks for trying. Go to every lecture, study the notes and do the assignments - you'll do fine! I'd take her again.
She is a good teacher. I think she teaches things very clearly. Something I am not very clear when I am reading the book, I can get the clear answer from her lecture. I like her class.

I feel people can confuse not liking the course with not liking the teacher. Economics can be hard for some people, and then they tend to blame the teacher for that. Iryna explains the content in a clear way, giving tons of examples. If you attend lectures, do the homework, and study a little, you will do fine... her tests and her grading are fair!

It's true that Iryna and ECON103 is not easy. But I would recommend Iryna. She gives lecture notes in lecture only. But, you'll find that her notes are very good to study off of. She goes over relevant and specific questions in lecture. So don't miss a lecture. Also, she gives previous midterms which are great to study off of.

Iryna wants to overload information into you, as fast as possible. I asked her two questions the whole semester during lectures and she acted like I was wasting her time, so I never bothered to ask again. She was just regurgitating textbook (badly written one) material onto the projector. The dreadful lectures made me feel super tired and bored.
It's a class where if you don't understand the concept then you wouldn't pass the course. Overall practice ALOT of past exam questions to be prepared, her lectures are okay. The curve will save you!
her accent makes it impossible to understand she never comes prepared for her lectures and makes examples up on the spot  her instruction are never clear

Iryna was pretty clear to understand despite her Russian accent. She made evening lectures a bit more enjoyable with her high energy and light jokes. Her lectures were understandable but the content is extremely difficult to grasp so studying concepts in your own time is a must! The bad part was that your mark relies on 2 midterms and 1 final exam.
